CVE-2024-57822.title: In Raptor RDF Syntax Library through 2.0.16, there is a heap-base ...
CVE-2024-57822.description: In Raptor RDF Syntax Library through 2.0.16, there is a heap-based buffer over-read when parsing triples with the nquads parser in raptor_ntriples_parse_term_internal().

CVE-2024-57823.title: In Raptor RDF Syntax Library through 2.0.16, there is an integer  ...
CVE-2024-57823.description: In Raptor RDF Syntax Library through 2.0.16, there is an integer underflow when normalizing a URI with the turtle parser in raptor_uri_normalize_path().
